variants.name: 恶作剧者 §
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家，如果他是爪牙：他的能力变为"每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家：恶魔得知他的角色。"
variants.otherNightReminder: The Prankster points to a player. Put them to sleep. If it's a Minion, mark that player with "Pranked", then wake that Minion and show them the "This character affected you" token and the Prankster token. All "Pranked" Minions choose a player; mark that player with "Demon Learns Tonight." Finally, wake the Demon, and point to each player marked "Demon learns tonight" in turn, and show them the corresponding character.
